biography: Mia Tomlinson (born 31 May 1995) is a British actress. On television, she is known for her roles in the BritBox thriller The Beast Must Die and as Anne Bonny in Netflix docuseries The Lost Pirate Kingdom (both 2021). She has starring role as Judy Warren in the horror film The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025).
name: Mia Tomlinson
